name: Mercenary patron
model: Russia / Wagner–Africa Corps model: coup-proofing services, no human-rights strings, payment in mining and oil concessions, arrives fast.
notes: The default regime-backer of the single-theater Sahel; fastest, no conditions.

name: Investor patron
model: China model: infrastructure-for-influence, non-interference doctrine, debt leverage, plays the long game.
notes: Slower but durable; competes hardest where governance is functional.

name: Proxy patron
model: Iran model: arms and ideology routed through the insurgent/faction graph itself.
notes: Competes hardest where an aligned faction graph already exists.
